memoryArtifacts.headline: Le Blount Family, in Letitia S. La Roche, North Carolina Society of Colonial Dames of America, Application for Membership, 20 April 1900, Page 7
memoryArtifacts.description:
In 1900, Letitia S. LaRoche (nee Letitia Gamble Shepard) applied for membership in the North Carolina Society of Colonial Dames of America.

This is an excerpt from an 8 page "Application for Membership of Mrs. Letitia S. La Roche, Dated April 20, 1900, Elected June 6, 1900."

It is probably not all accurate.

zh.Saxlingham, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可薩可林加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen le Blount於1166年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可易沃斯時，他的父親Gilbert le Blount47歲，母親Agnes de Lisle36歲。他於大約1196年與Maria Blount在英國諾福爾可薩可林加姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1235年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可薩可林加姆享年69歲。

zh-hans.Saxlingham, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可薩可林加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen le Blount于1166年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可易沃斯时，他的父亲Gilbert le Blount47岁，母亲Agnes de Lisle36岁。他于大约1196年与Maria Blount在英国諾福爾可薩可林加姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1235年在英国英格兰諾福爾可薩可林加姆享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen le Blount was born in 1166, in Ixworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert le Blount, was 47 and his mother, Agnes de Lisle, was 36. He married Maria Blount about 1196, in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1235, in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen le Blount est né en 1166, à Ixworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert le Blount, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Lisle, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Maria Blount environ 1196, à Saxlingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1235, à Saxlingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen le Blount 1166 in Ixworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert le Blount 47 und seine Mutter Agnes de Lisle 36. Er hat um 1196 in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England Maria Blount geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1235 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen le Blount è nato il nel 1166 nel Ixworth, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert le Blount, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Lisle, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Maria Blount circa 1196, nel Saxlingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1235, nel Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen le Blountが1166年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイクスウオルスで生まれた時，父Gilbert le Blountは47歳，母Agnes de Lisleは36歳であった。約1196年にイギリスノーフォルクサクスリンガムでMaria Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1235年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクサクスリンガムで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen le Blount(이)가 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert le Blount(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Lisle(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1196년 영국 노르폴크 사스링함에서 Maria Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 사스링함에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Saxlingham, Norfolk, England: Saxlingham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen le Blount nasceu em 1166, em Ixworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert le Blount, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Lisle, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Blount aproximadamente 1196, em Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1235, em Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen le Blount родился в 1166 г. в местности иксворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert le Blount было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Lisle, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Blount около 1196 г. в местности сакслингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1235 г. в местности сакслингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen le Blount nació en 1166, en Ixworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilbert le Blount, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Agnes de Lisle, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Maria Blount aproximadamente 1196, en Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1235, en Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
